title: OpenSourceReview
description: Schema for reviewing and triaging open-source software libraries used in SaaS products.

package.description: The name of the open-source package/library (e.g. lodash, react, sidekiq).

licence.description: The license type of the package (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0).

useCase.description: How the library is integrated into the application (e.g. client-side utility, backend worker).

distributionModel.description: How the SaaS software containing this library is distributed to users.

modifiedOrUnmodified.description: Whether the internal engineering team has modified the source code of the library.

linkedOrSeparateService.description: How the library is linked to proprietary code (e.g. statically linked, dynamically linked, run as a separate microservice).

attributionNeeded.description: Whether the license requires attribution or copyright notices in the product UI or documentation.

copyleftConcern.description: Whether the license triggers reciprocal sharing obligations (e.g. GPL, AGPL, SSPL).

approvalStatus.description: The current legal approval status of the library for the specified use case.
